## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to explore potential collaboration between Richard Murphy and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Richard Murphy is planning a portfolio career** after building successful content engines at HPE and ServiceNow, and is exploring opportunities with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [**GrowthX uses an agentic platform** to deliver content as a service, focusing on high-volume, cost-effective production for AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [**A pilot project at ServiceNow was proposed** to enrich existing thought leadership with practical content, aiming to capture AI search citations for key buying centers (e.g., CISOs).](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=2414.0)
  - [**Richard will circulate GrowthX's intro deck internally** to explore a potential pilot, while Marcel will connect Richard with investors seeking leaders who can drive AI visibility without building large teams.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=2523.0)

## Topics

### Richard Murphy's Background & Goals

  - [**Experience:** 10 years building content marketing engines at HPE and ServiceNow, specializing in thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [**ServiceNow Tenure:** Grew with the company from 5.5k to 26k employees and $1.8B to $13B revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Current Role:** Leads a mature content operation known for global research studies (e.g., "Enterprise AI Maturity Index" with Oxford Economics) and a partnership with Pearson.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**Future Plans:** Transitioning to a portfolio career (consulting, startups) and exploring ways to collaborate with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

### GrowthX's Platform & Service Model

  - [**Origin:** Marcel Santilli's prior success at Deepgram (24x traffic, 4x revenue) by scaling content production with early AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**Core Insight:** Deliver outcomes as a service, not just tools. This abstracts away AI complexity (prompt engineering, tool integration) for customers.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Platform Architecture:**](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
      - [**Agentic Workflows:** Codified processes (research, writing, fact-checking) run by AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
      - [**Context Engineering:** "Artifacts" (documents on company, products, personas) ground the AI in specific business knowledge, preventing generic outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
      - [**Knowledge Graph:** Stores all research and content as semantically linked nodes for accurate, efficient retrieval.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking Agent:** Verifies claims passage-by-passage, flagging or rewriting statements with low confidence (e.g., changing "14.3% gains" to "suggests improvement" if the specific figure isn't universally established).](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [**Business Status:** \~60 customers, \>$13M revenue, cashflow positive.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### Proposed ServiceNow Pilot

  - [**Problem:** ServiceNow's premium thought leadership is underutilized, lacking integration into practical content that captures AI search citations.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [**Solution:** A pilot project to enrich existing assets with practical, search-optimized content.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=2414.0)
      - [**Process:** Compile existing thought leadership into a GrowthX knowledge base → Use it to generate new guides and articles that capture AI citations for high-intent queries.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=2414.0)
  - [**Pilot Focus:** A specific "buying center" (e.g., CISOs) to create a content suite guiding them from awareness to purchase.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=2414.0)
  - [**Strategic Alignment:** Supports ServiceNow's shift from selling individual solutions to the full platform.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Send GrowthX's intro deck to Richard Murphy.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=2523.0)
  - [**Richard Murphy:** Circulate the deck internally at ServiceNow to explore a pilot project.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=2523.0)
  - [**Marcel Santilli:** Connect Richard Murphy with investors seeking leaders who can drive AI visibility without building large, costly teams.](https://fathom.video/share/o2J2_WyykwxFz5b9xnBUbxYj4WED1XTm?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)
